title: Morning briefing
body:
Good morning, Sunny. 
* There are multiple automated 'thank you' emails from Anthropic, but one email from Jonathan Taylor and a job application for Junior Software Engineer (AI-Native) at Homey that may need attention.
* Today's top job picks from the shortlist are D Graduate AI & Algorithms Engineer and UK AI Engineer Graduate, both strong matches for your profile and experience.
* Your CareerOS project has seen updates to cover letters and resumes for various companies, including Spectrum IT, Sanderson, and Capital One UK.
* Keep going, Sunny - you've got a strong set of job matches and a solid foundation to build on; stay positive and focused on your goals.

title: Job shortlist refreshed
body:
Here are the top 5 job matches for a graduate/junior AI-ML engineer with an MSc in AI & Robotics, a published reinforcement-learning paper, ~1 year experience, and a UK Graduate Visa:

1. **D Graduate AI & Algorithms Engineer (2026 start)**: This role fits as it's a graduate position in AI and algorithms, matching your MSc in AI & Robotics and interest in machine learning. [https://www.gradcracker.com/search/computing-technology/ai-machine-learning-graduate-jobs](https://www.gradcracker.com/search/computing-technology/ai-machine-learning-graduate-jobs)
2. **UK AI Engineer Graduate (May 2026)**: This job fits as it's a graduate AI engineer position in Cambridge, starting in May 2026, with a salary of £25,000. [https://uk.prosple.com/ai-graduate-jobs-uk](https://uk.prosple.com/ai-graduate-jobs-uk)
3. **Data Science and AI Graduate Scheme**: This scheme fits as it's a 2-year program that involves designing and deploying robust machine learning and AI models, aligning with your interests and experience. [https://www.lloydsbankinggrouptalent.com/our-opportunities/graduates/data-science-and-ai-graduate-scheme/](https://www.lloydsbankinggrouptalent.com/our-opportunities/graduates/data-science-and-ai-graduate-scheme/)
4. **Junior Machine Learning Engineer**: This role fits as it involves designing, training, deploying, and monitoring machine learning and deep learning models, utilizing your skills and experience in AI and machine learning. [https://uk.indeed.com/q-machine-learning-engineer-junior-jobs.html](https://uk.indeed.com/q-machine-learning-engineer-junior-jobs.html)
5. **Ml Engineer Graduate**: This job fits as it's a graduate position in machine learning engineering, with various companies hiring on Indeed, offering a range of opportunities and salaries. [https://uk.indeed.com/q-ml-engineer-graduate-jobs.html](https://uk.indeed.com/q-ml-engineer-graduate-jobs.html)

These roles align with your background, experience, and interests, and do not require sponsorship, making them strong matches for your profile.
